revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 64x64 px pixel-art terrain tile sheet for game development, arranged as a strict 4 rows x 4 columns grid, 16 total frames, each frame exactly 16x16 px. No visible grid lines, no tile IDs, no labels, no borders, no watermark, no text. Fully opaque final image. Crisp SNES-era 16-bit pixel art, low-resolution hard pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette, soft warm golden-hour top-left light, readable pixel clusters, one-pixel dark outline only where useful.

Subject: top-down flowing clear mountain river autotile set, fresh blue-green flowing water with gentle white ripples and soft foam, warm sky reflections, faint pebbly stream-bed visible. Calm, beautiful, hand-painted-inspired but still true crisp pixel art. Water must read as clean fresh stream, not flat blue.

Strict cell contents:
Row 1: four open flowing WATER interior variations with gentle current ripples; each water tile fills the whole 16x16 cell and is seamless.
Row 2: water-to-bank EDGE tiles in this order: N, S, W, E. Water meets a pebbly grassy bank on that side; curved, broken, natural shoreline boundaries; avoid straight vertical or horizontal strips.
Row 3: OUTER CORNER bank transition tiles in this order: NW, NE, SW, SE. Natural curved bank corners, pebbles, grass overlap, shallow-water fringe, broken shoreline variants.
Row 4: accent tiles in this order: wet boulder in stream, foam swirl, reed clump, mossy stepping stone. Keep accents contained within their 16x16 cells and same scale as the set.

Tilemap quality: every frame stays inside its own cell and fills edge-to-edge as a usable tile; seamless autotile feel; no checkerboard read; vary texture, edge breakup, current highlights, pebble clusters, grass overlap, and lighting while keeping cohesive identity. Think world-map scale and adventure geography, not close-up village ground detail.

Background/empty space: because all terrain tiles fill edge-to-edge, there should be no empty space. If any empty pixels are unavoidable, fill them solid #FF00FF magenta. Do not use transparent pixels.

Avoid all protected or modern content: no Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna characters, logos, likenesses, or references; no samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, birds, companion creatures, letter emblems, UI, text, or watermark.
